title: GET_CLIENT_DYN
text: GET_CLIENT_DYN Get dynamic information about a client registered with the Uniface Router. operation GET_CLIENT_DYN params string Host : IN ; (C256) numeric PID : IN ; (I4) boolean UpdateStatic : OUT ; (B2) entity URCLIENTD.UROUTMON : OUT endparams Parameters Host —client’s host name (from the URCLIENTS entity). Mandatory. PID —client’s process ID. Mandatory. UpdateStatic —specifies whether the last returned static clients view should be updated (TRUE) or not (FALSE). URCLIENTD.UROUTMON—single occurrence of entity URCLIENTD.UROUTMON, containing client information. Table 1. URCLIENTD.UROUTMON entity Fieldname Packing Code Data Type Description host C256 String Client's host / IP address: primary key field 1 pid I4 Numeric Client's process ID: primary key field 2 idle I4 Numeric Ticks idle idlepercent I1 Numeric Percentage idle busy I4 Numeric Ticks busy busypercent I1 Numeric Percentage busy wait I4 Numeric Ticks wait waitpercent I1 Numeric Percentage wait state C1 String B = busy, I =idle, W =wait srvust C20 String Current or last server's UST srvustque I2 Numeric Position in server UST wait queue srvid I4 Numeric Current or last server's server ID srvidque I2 Numeric Position in server ID wait queue Return Values If successful, $status is set to the number (zero or 1) of returned URCLIENTD occurrences. A return of zero must be considered an error and a reason to update the static clients view if a host name and process ID were supplied from it. For more information, see GET_CLIENTS . Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The GET_CLIENT_DYN operation gets dynamic information about a client, identified by its host name and process ID, that is registered with the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful?
